title: Neek (creature)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Neek.jpg]] |name=Neek |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]][[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] |class=[[Reptile]] |subspecies= |races= |height=0.3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |habitat= |diet=Herbivorous |language= }} {{Quote|Look, Mama, the neeks are dancing.''"
"''Be careful, Little Gem. Those neeks have sharp teeth.|Vima and Nomi Sunrider|audio=Neeks-TOTJ.flac|[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]]}} '''Neeks''' were reptilian herbivores, averaging at about thirty centimeters in height, indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]. They were non-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], and could often be seen congregating in flocks of about half a dozen, banding together for protection against the larger, carnivorous creatures, such as the [[Hssiss]]. Neeks served largely as [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] for these animals, though they did have an effective defense mechanism in the form of their lack of long amounts of sleep. They needed only two or so hours of sleep per day, allowing them to replenish their strength in shifts.''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' Although they were generally pleasant creatures, neeks were known to be extremely paranoid and scatty, though this was also used to other's advantage: they were often used by scouts and explorers when venturing into new territories. The neeks would become jittery at the first sign of danger, as their visual and aural sense were far more attuned than most sentient species in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Over time, the neeks developed an immunity to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], due to them living in close proximity to the dark side [[Vergence/Legends|nexus]] that was [[Lake Natth]].''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' Neeks had a unique skeletal structure, and unlike most reptiles, walked on their hind legs, with smaller forelegs used as arms. They had small fingers used to pull up roots and vegetation, and had a large tail which gave them an extraordinary sense of balance. Gray in color,''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'' they could run over sixty [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kilometers per hour]]. [[Vima Sunrider]] used to play with them during her time on Ambria, and once chased them to the edge of [[Lake Natth]]. Her mother [[Nomi Sunrider|Nomi]], however, used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to make the two beasts attack each other, and took her daughter to safety. As a test, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] had his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]] tame a wild neek. After she successfully tamed and brought the little creature back to their camp, Bane used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to snap its neck and had her drop it in a pot of bubbling stew. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}} *''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Rule of Two (audiobook)}} {{Flash}} *{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_2.html|Yet Another Greenputt League}} *{{InsiderCite|issue1=76|issue2=77|Changing Seasons|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} *''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]'' *[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}} *''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' {{Mo}} *{{GalaxiesAED}} {{c|Cut mention}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|27|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 2}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/take-me-out-to-the-ballgame-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-2|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 2: Take Me Out to the Ball Game|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Neek |pl=Neek }} [[Category:Creatures of Ambria]] [[Category:Grassland and plains creatures]] [[Category:Herbivorous creatures]] [[Category:Herd and pack creatures]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Reptiles]]
